$comment: Tool 06 inventory template — token contract. Every {{TOKEN}} placeholder used in any HTML/CSS/JS file in this template is declared here. The generator (Momentum-website/functions/api/website-generate.js, inventory branch) reads this file, fetches each template file, runs token substitution against the values supplied by the source field, and bundles the result. Any string token not provided by research falls back to its `fallback` value. Any block token without research data renders empty (or its `emptyFallback` if specified).
description: High-ticket inventory site for vehicle, equipment, golf cart, RV, boat, motorcycle, or machinery dealers. Includes admin panel for managing carts/products, GHL calendar embed for booking, and dynamic inventory.json rendering across home + shop pages.

{{BUSINESS_NAME}}.notes: Primary business name used in titles, hero copy, footer brand.

{{BUSINESS_NAME_LLC}}.notes: Legal entity name. Used in privacy policy, SMS opt-in disclosure. Falls back to BUSINESS_NAME if no LLC suffix discovered.

{{BUSINESS_NAME_SHORT}}.notes: Short brand reference used in body prose ('Why SNH Is Different', 'from SNH'). If business name is already short, this equals BUSINESS_NAME.

{{BUSINESS_NAME_SLUG}}.notes: URL-safe lowercase-hyphenated slug. Used in GitHub repo paths, log prefixes, user-agent strings.

{{OWNER_NAME}}.notes: Full owner name. Used in about page hero, page titles, contact descriptions.

{{OWNER_FIRST}}.notes: First name only. Used in conversational copy ('Call Bill', 'Bill personally handles').

{{ABOUT_NAV_LABEL}}.notes: Nav label. Defaults to 'About Us' when no specific owner is named.

{{PHONE}}.notes: Display format. Used in nav, footer, CTAs.

{{EMAIL}}.notes: Public-facing email. Used in footer + contact page mailto links.

{{SITE_DOMAIN}}.source: research.business.contact.website (stripped of protocol/path) OR new client domain
{{SITE_DOMAIN}}.notes: Bare domain. Used in canonical URLs, OG tags, sitemap.xml URLs.

{{ADDRESS_LINE_1}}.notes: Street address. Used in footer + contact info block.

{{CITY_STATE}}.notes: City + 2-letter state with comma. Used in nav-area pills, page titles.

{{CITY_STATE_ZIP}}.notes: Full address line 2. Used in footer + contact info block.

{{CITY_STATE_NO_COMMA}}.notes: Used in API source strings + appointment address fields where comma would break parsing.

{{REGION_SHORT}}.notes: Marketing-shorthand region. Used in hero pills, prose.

{{REGION_LONG}}.notes: Long-form region. Used in about page narrative.

{{LOGO_PRIMARY_TEXT}}.notes: Stylized logo text — first portion. Pairs with LOGO_SECONDARY_TEXT in the footer/admin styled-text logo.

{{LOG_PREFIX}}.notes: Log line prefix in API functions: console.error(`[${LOG_PREFIX}] ...`).

{{GA_ID}}.notes: Google Analytics 4 measurement ID. If not set, the GA <script> tag still renders but tracks nothing — recommend swapping for an empty string or wrapping in conditional at gen time.

{{GHL_CALENDAR_EMBED_URL}}.notes: GHL calendar embed iframe src. Each client grabs from GHL → Calendars → Share → Embed.

{{FACEBOOK_URL}}.notes: Footer social link. Render the link only if the URL is non-empty (block-level conditional in generator).

{{INSTAGRAM_URL}}.notes: Footer social link. Render the link only if non-empty.

{{GOOGLE_REVIEWS_URL}}.notes: Long Google Maps reviews link. Drive from research.researchNotes.googleBusinessFound + place lookup.

{{FINANCE_PARTNER_1_URL}}.notes: Optional finance partner link. Generator omits the entire finance popover block if no partners are present in research.

{{USED_INVENTORY_URL}}.notes: Optional external partner link for used inventory (some dealers operate a separate site for used). Generator omits the linked block if empty.

{{TRUST_QUALIFIER}}.notes: Single-phrase trust descriptor used in page titles + meta descriptions. Pulls the strongest signal from research.trustSignals.

{{STAT_LABEL_TRUST}}.notes: Stat-bar trust label (4th stat block on home page).

{{INDUSTRY_DESCRIPTOR}}.notes: Lowercase industry descriptor for prose. Used in privacy policy.

{{META_DESCRIPTION}}.example: Southern NH's premier veteran-owned golf cart dealer. New & used golf carts, LSV sales, rentals, repairs, and battery upgrades in Londonderry, NH.
{{META_DESCRIPTION}}.notes: Index page meta description. AI-generated from research.

{{OG_DESCRIPTION}}.example: Veteran-owned golf cart dealer in Londonderry, NH. Premium golf carts from $7,295.
{{OG_DESCRIPTION}}.notes: Shorter Open Graph description. AI-generated from research.

{{HERO_BADGE_TAGLINE}}.notes: Hero pill tagline. AI-generated from research.

{{HERO_USE_CASE_LIST}}.example: lake houses, campgrounds, neighborhoods, and beyond
{{HERO_USE_CASE_LIST}}.notes: Use-case list inserted into hero subhead.

{{INVENTORY_HEADLINE_COPY}}.example: 15+ models in stock — from cruisers to off-road beasts to street-legal LSVs.

{{INVENTORY_DESCRIPTOR}}.example: 15+ models from $7,295. New carts, LSVs, off-road
{{INVENTORY_DESCRIPTOR}}.notes: Inserted into shop page meta description.

{{LIFESTYLE_SECTION_EYEBROW}}.notes: Eyebrow above the lifestyle photo grid section.

{{ITEM_PLACEHOLDER_EXAMPLE}}.notes: Example shown in admin panel 'add new item' form placeholder text.

{{ITEM_NAME_PLURAL_LOWER}}.notes: Plural lowercase noun for catalog items, used in inline prose.

{{STARTING_PRICE}}.notes: Lowest cart price as anchor. Computed from inventory.json at gen time, or set manually if no inventory yet.

{{TYPEWRITER_PHRASES_JSON}}.example: ["By Someone Who Served.","For Southern NH.","For Lake Houses."]
{{TYPEWRITER_PHRASES_JSON}}.notes: JSON-encoded array of phrases that cycle in the hero typewriter effect. Wrapped in JSON.parse() at template time so the file stays JS-valid.

{{PRIMARY_COLOR}}.notes: Main brand color. Used in nav, headings, primary buttons, theme-color meta.

{{ACCENT_COLOR}}.notes: Accent color. Used in CTAs, highlights, gold buttons.

{{HERO_TRUST_PILLS_HTML}}.example: 🎖️ Veteran-Owned LLC⭐ 4.8-Star Google Rating📍 Londonderry, NH
{{HERO_TRUST_PILLS_HTML}}.notes: Inner HTML of the hero-trust-pills div. Generator wraps each trust signal in a <span class='trust-pill'> with an emoji icon.

{{FOOTER_TRUST_BADGES_HTML}}.example: 🎖️ Veteran-Owned LLC✅ Authorized Dealer
{{FOOTER_TRUST_BADGES_HTML}}.notes: Full <div> block including the footer-trust-badges wrapper. Generator omits entire block if research has no trust signals.

{{REVIEWS_GRID_HTML}}.notes: Inner HTML of the reviews-grid div. Each testimonial renders with stars, body text, and reviewer attribution. Generator caps at 3 testimonials for desktop layout.

{{ABOUT_VALUE_TRUST_LINE_HTML}}.notes: Single-line trust value in the about page values list. Omitted if no qualifier.

exclude_explanation.google495cd3fb4cc9affc.html: Google Search Console verification file specific to snhgolfcarts.com. Each client gets their own when they verify their domain.
exclude_explanation.inventory.json: Sample SNH data. Generator writes a fresh empty {filters:{},carts:[],accessories:[]} file for new clients; admin panel populates it.
exclude_explanation.sitemap.xml: Generator constructs sitemap.xml dynamically from the chosen page set + SITE_DOMAIN.
exclude_explanation.functions/api/get-slots.js: Deprecated stub — booking now handled by GHL embed iframe.

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.purpose: Used by Tool 06 generator only — not by the deployed client site itself.

GHL_API_KEY.purpose: GHL sub-account API key for contact creation + appointment booking via /api/submit-service and /api/buy-now.

GHL_LOCATION_ID.purpose: GHL sub-account location ID. Required for all GHL API calls.

GHL_CALENDAR_EMBED_URL.purpose: GHL calendar embed iframe src. Substituted into {{GHL_CALENDAR_EMBED_URL}} on the home page hero.
GHL_CALENDAR_EMBED_URL.how_to_obtain: GHL → Calendars → [calendar] → Share → Embed → copy iframe src URL

GITHUB_TOKEN.purpose: GitHub Personal Access Token (repo write scope). Used by /api/update-inventory and /api/upload-photo to commit admin panel changes back to the repo.
GITHUB_TOKEN.how_to_obtain: GitHub → Settings → Developer settings → Personal access tokens → Generate new token (repo scope)

GITHUB_REPO.purpose: Target GitHub repo for admin panel writes. Format: 'org/repo'.

ADMIN_PASSWORD.purpose: Admin panel login password. Generator generates a random per-client password and includes it in the post-generation README.

post_generation_steps: 1. Create a GitHub repo for the client under MoreThanMomentum org (manual)
2. Push the generated bundle to the new repo
3. Connect Cloudflare Pages to the new repo
4. Set Cloudflare Pages env vars (see env_vars_required above)
5. Set up GHL sub-account: API key, location, calendar
6. Grab GHL calendar embed URL and set as env var
7. Hand admin password to client via secure channel
8. Custom domain: connect client domain in Cloudflare Pages
9. Add Google Search Console verification file (replaces google*.html)
10. (Optional) Add real images to /images/ paths listed in image_placeholders above
